name: period-repair-manual
description: Dr. Lara Briden's 'Period Repair Manual: Natural Treatment for Better Hormones and Better Periods' — a comprehensive guide to treating period problems with nutrition, supplements, and lifestyle instead of just the pill.
useCase: Understand menstrual health, treat period problems naturally, balance hormones through nutrition, and navigate fertility and perimenopause.
knownRisks: Not a substitute for medical advice — always include a disclaimer
Natural medicine perspective — may differ from conventional gynecological approaches
Covers complex medical conditions — individual results vary
